---
title: "test_phase_88_muninn_pennyone_connection.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_phase_88_muninn_pennyone_connection.py"
loc: 70
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.88
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 4.83
overall_score: 4.79
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestMuninnPennyOneConnection, setUp. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [json](file://json)
- [time](file://time)
- [requests](file://requests)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel.coordinator](file://src.sentinel.coordinator)
- [src.core.telemetry](file://src.core.telemetry)

### Exports
- `TestMuninnPennyOneConnection`
- `setUp`
- `tearDown`
- `test_mission_coordinator_acquisition`
- `test_subspace_telemetry_connection`
